title: secretx-azure-kv: implement Azure Key Vault backend
description: Implement SecretStore for Azure Key Vault secrets. URI: secretx://azure-kv/<vault-name>/<secret-name>. get() calls GetSecret. put() calls SetSecret. refresh() calls GetSecret with cache bypass. Credential chain via azure_identity (environment vars, managed identity, Azure CLI). Vault name from the URI host component. Also implement SigningBackend via AzureKeyVaultHsmBackend for keys in HSM-backed vaults: sign() calls Sign, public_key_der() calls GetKey and encodes as DER SubjectPublicKeyInfo. Dep: secretx-core, azure_security_keyvault_secrets, azure_identity.
